text: Allah's Messenger (%) said, *I have five names: | am Muhammad and Ahmad; | am Al-Mahi through whom Allah will efiminate infidelity: I'am AbHashir who will be the first to be resurrected, the people being resurrected there after; and | am also AAgib (ie. There will be no prophet after me). [ . : Sahih al-Bukhari 3532
